8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.vis-2-widgets-rssfeed/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-widgets/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8906.issue: [S8906] Dependabot entry for "npm" uses "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to a random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for more balanced load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".
